intended_use: The VMS+ 3.0 is an adjunct to existing ultrasound imaging systems and is intended to record, analyze, store and retrieve digital ultrasound images for computerized 3-dimensional image processing. The
intended_use_full: The VMS+ 3.0 is an adjunct to existing ultrasound imaging systems and is intended to record, analyze, store and retrieve digital ultrasound images for computerized 3-dimensional image processing. The VMS+ 3.0 system is indicated for use where Left Ventricle (LV), Right Ventricle (RV), Left Atrium (LA), and Right Atrium (RA) volumes and ejection fractions are warranted or desired.
target_condition: Cardiac chamber volume and ejection fraction assessment
ground_truth: Volumes obtained from the legally marketed VMS+ (predicate device)
other_metrics: Performance bench testing verified that the device delivers volume measurements equivalent in accuracy when compared with volumes obtained using the legally marketed VMS+
